name: delegated-execution-workspace
description: Synthetic monorepo superproject for delegated execution cross-repo development orchestration

scripts.submodules:sync: git submodule sync --recursive && git submodule update --init --recursive
scripts.dev:platform:restart: docker compose -f repos/platform/deploy/platform/docker-compose.yml --env-file repos/platform/deploy/platform/.env down && docker compose -f repos/platform/deploy/platform/docker-compose.yml --env-file repos/platform/deploy/platform/.env up -d --build
scripts.dev:client:bootstrap: corepack pnpm --dir repos/client --filter @delexec/ops exec node src/cli.js bootstrap --platform http://127.0.0.1:8080
scripts.dev:client:status: corepack pnpm --dir repos/client --filter @delexec/ops exec node src/cli.js status
scripts.dev:client:supervisor: corepack pnpm --dir repos/client --filter @delexec/ops exec node src/cli.js start
scripts.dev:console: corepack pnpm run dev:console:gateway & corepack pnpm run dev:console:ui
scripts.dev:platform-console: corepack pnpm run dev:console:gateway & corepack pnpm run dev:platform-console:ui
scripts.ci: node tools/validate-submodules.mjs && node tools/validate-change-bundle.mjs && node tools/check-boundaries.mjs && node tools/contracts-check.mjs && node tools/source-integration-check.mjs
